pages.raw_text:
There Is every reason to expect
that inside the next few weeks all
local unions will be gathered into
the Central Labor union in a trades
section organization. This is the
substance of the report of the COM
mittee of the central body that ex-
tended to the building trades an in
vitation to join the big central or
ganization.


In the city of Seattle the trade
section system has been an un-
qualified success. Occasionally a
union gets disgruntled and pulls
out, but as rule they return in
short order when their situations
are declared open to nonunion
workmen. This is the way In which
the building trades work in that
city. The moment a union pulls
out OF its trade section their work
is declared an open shop" propo-
sition and the other trades work
with any kind of labor il may suit
the contractor or employer TO Sc
cure


There will be enough unions rep
resenting the building trades in the
Central Labor union, with the
unions which now constitute the
structural alliance, to form a good
building trades section When this
is accomplished 1t is likely that all
other unions will find it to their
advantage to affiliate.
